openItems.actorRoleGovernance: CME schema contains actorRole, action, objectRole, contextRole fields. No contract assigns these to MEDIA_ENUM_REGISTRY_V1 or EVENT_ENUM_REGISTRY_V1. Governance gap. Requires future contract authorship before these fields can be enum-locked in the media lane.
openItems.mfuEnums: targetClass, polarity, and confidenceLevel from MEDIA-FRAMING-AUDIT-AGENT.md remain deferred. MFU canonical schema not yet defined. Out of scope until contract authorship.

subtype.description: Descriptive taxonomy tag for CME objects. Assigned by META. Exactly one per CME. Rule-based and deterministic. Participates in CME_FINGERPRINT_V1 as field 5 (subtype_norm).
subtype.governanceNote: No hybrid tagging allowed. Exactly one subtype per CME. 'other' requires explicit justification in eventDescription. Subtype does not imply importance, structural mutation magnitude, arc relevance, or creative weight. Locked in MEDIA-EVENT-TRANSFORMER-AGENT.md Section V and MEDIA-EVENT-TRANSFORMER-AGENT(META).md Section V.

assignmentExamples.other: Event does not fit any other subtype — requires justification

framingType.description: Classification of the rhetorical or discourse function of a media framing unit. Assigned during MFU extraction. Exactly one per MFU. Rule-based and deterministic.
framingType.governanceNote: Values sourced from MEDIA-FRAMING-AUDIT-AGENT.md §Proposed Classification Notes. Does not participate in any fingerprint authority. MFU canonical schema is deferred — fingerprintParticipation will be reassessed at that time.
